name: 600 MG Glutathione For Injection
about: 600 MG Glutathione For Injection is a liquid medicine that is used to improve skin complexion and reduce the appearance of blemishes and dark spots. Glutathione is a powerful antioxidant that helps to detoxify the body and protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals and environmental toxins. This injection is made in India and is available in a dosage of 600mg, which should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. It is recommended to store this injection in a cool place to maintain its effectiveness.
